breakdown.raw_0D: 16 (βN, βp, βt, q95, κ, li, Wmhd, q_axis, a, δ_low, δ_up, Ip, ne, f_GW, p_rad, P_NBI)
breakdown.multi_scale: 30 (6 key signals × 5 views: sm3, sm7, sm15, diff_3_7, diff_7_15)

dataset.disruption_labels: 714 ms-precision from FAIR-MAST ops log + 82 expert (disruption-py)

timepoint_eval_with_recovery_filter.note: Sustained ≥2 consecutive timepoints + recovery filter (drop >30% in 6tp → suppress)

shot_level_max_probability.note: Alarm if max(P_GRU) in shot exceeds threshold

key_findings: 16-channel 78-feature model: AUC=0.691 on diverse 2941 shots (vs 0.842 on curated 255)
Multi-scale diffs essential: 78f gives 53% det vs 18% with 32f raw-only
Recovery filter reduces FA but also reduces detection (too aggressive for diverse disruptions)
Shot-level th=0.5: 39% det @ 12% FA — usable conservative operating point
AUC drop from 0.842 to 0.691 reflects testing across ALL disruption types, not model degradation
